results.title: AinTransitions for DaVinci Resolve
excerpts:
Section Title: Why should you choose AinTransitions DR Pack for DaVinci Resolve?
Content:
Introducing AinTransitions DR, a comprehensive pack of video transition templates for DaVinci Resolve. Transitions are made specifically for DaVinci Resolve, so you can add them directly to the timeline with minimal effort. Just Drag & Drop. The transition resolution will automatically adjust to the resolution of your project timeline.
Various categories and styles of transitions, any fps and any resolution, previews of all transitions, good documentation and video tutorials. All this will make your regular work with transitions in DaVinci Resolve as simple and convenient as possible. No more wasting precious extra time creating your transitions to make your project unique. Now everything is available in one large and high-quality package.

results.title: DaVinci Resolve Templates - freevisuals.net
excerpts:
Section Title: Top 100+ Free > ... > Easy To Customize These DaVinci Templates
Content:
Download the Templates - Check out and download the templates on this page and on the rest of our freevisuals site
Download the Davinci Resolve software itself if you don't have it already. **There is a** [**free version at the BlackMagicDesign website**](https://www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/davinciresolve)
Import the Templates into DaVinci Resolve - Open DaVinci Resolve once installed and navigate to the Media Pool or Edit Page. Drag and drop the downloaded title templates for DaVinci Resolve or color grading presets directly into the project library. Ensure they are compatible with your software version. Apply the Templates - For motion graphics templates, place them on your timeline and adjust their position as needed. Use DaVinci Resolve transitions by placing them between two clips for smooth scene changes.

results.title: ResolveX: 10 free transitions for DaVinci Resolve v17 & 18
excerpts:
Section Title: ResolveX: 10 free transitions for DaVinci Resolve v17 & 18
Content:
We understand how difficult it is to create remarkable videos on a consistent basis. Creativity might run dry or you might just not have enough time to create all of the effects manually yourself. Fortunately, video transition effects are an easy way to keep your projects engaging and stylish. This is where our free transitions pack comes into play. Designed to help video editors create engaging and stunning videos, these 10 free transitions for DaVinci Resolve v17 & 18 are a clean and fun way to breathe life into a boring project. The 10 free transitions consist of a single variation of Camera Shake, Glitch, Lens Distortion, Pan, Push, Spin, Swirl, Whip, Film Roll, & Zoom transitions.
Note: We have not included Film Roll in the DaVinci Resolve v17 & 18 pack as it comes with the latest versions itself. So, we have replaced it with the ZigZag transition
